full_text:
Lu Jing (Shiren) 陸景 (士仁)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Jing (陸景), styledShiren (士仁), was born in Wu. The second son of Lu Kang and Wu Grand Admiral. Died in battle with Jin forces. Lu Jing was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Lu Jing lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
